vesting.value: DELGADO PROPERTY HOLDINGS LLC, an Arizona limited liability company

referenced_authority.value: Statement of Authority recorded concurrently as Instrument No. 20220200002

due_on_sale_note.value: The DOT recorded at 20170200002 contains a standard due-on-sale clause. Transfer to a grantor-owned LLC may trigger the clause at the lender's option (12 USC § 1701j-3 has no SFR-to-LLC exception), but enforcement is at lender discretion and is rarely exercised for owner-occupied pass-through LLCs. No assumption agreement has been recorded.

source_note.value: Demo-only synthesized LLC conveyance for Delgado parcel 304-78-411 — transfers title from Maria Elena Delgado (individual) to her wholly-owned AZ LLC for estate-planning / asset-protection purposes. The 2017 DOT (20170200002) is NOT released by this conveyance; it remains open in Maria's individual name (lc-012), creating a live examiner disclosure. Not present in publicapi.recorder.maricopa.gov.

raw_api_response.synthesized_note: Demo-only individual-to-LLC conveyance for Delgado parcel 304-78-411; not present in publicapi.recorder.maricopa.gov.
